signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**

The SEC has officially dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, marking a watershed moment for the cryptocurrency[1]. This resolution removes a regulatory overhang that had suppressed XRP's price for years and signals fundamental regulatory clarity around the token[1].

signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Officially Launched at Full Scale | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Officially Launched at Full Scale | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ripple has completed the official full-scale rollout of its RLUSD stablecoin across both the XRP Ledger and Ethereum, attracting massive capital inflows to the ecosystem[2]. This represents a major milestone in Ripple's payment infrastructure expansion.

signals.headline: XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Stage | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Stage | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP ETF approvals are progressing to their final stage of consideration, with institutional adoption now at all-time highs[2]. This development parallels broader institutional enthusiasm in cryptocurrency markets, including Bitcoin ETF inflows of nearly $1 billion.
